name: majetot
description: A full-stack web app for a small group of friends (2–5 people) to track their placement preparation together. Users join a group, upload a JSON curriculum template, and track topic checkboxes + lecture counts per section. Progress updates trigger AI-generated motivational messages sent to a Telegram group.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n "client,server" -c "bgBlue.bold,bgMagenta.bold" "npm run dev --prefix client" "npm run dev --prefix server"
